split_policy: 8:2 stratified split when class counts permit

fairness_protocol.cold: same real CICIDS split and noise protocol
fairness_protocol.graph_cold: same encoder/data protocol plus Graph-CDM/evidence weighting

err_definition: ERR is measured on clean informative samples using retained(v)=1[w(v)>=tau_ret] and Tail-ERR; final ERR is the average of ERR and Tail-ERR.
blocking_reason: Second verified dataset is not ready.
